description: A staff member has moved and needs to update their home address for payroll and tax purposes.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and authenticate their identity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely verifies the employee's identity.

nodes.task_description: Guide the employee to the self-service section of the HR portal to update their address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions for the employee to make the change themselves.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the employee that the change was saved successfully.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the employee check that the new address is reflected in the portal.
